things.name: Lake Toba & Samosir Island
things.description: World's largest volcanic lake - 30km wide caldera with the Batak island culture within

things.name: Maimoon Palace
things.description: 1888 Sultanate of Deli palace with a blend of Moorish and Italian architectural styles

things.name: Great Mosque of Medan (Al Mashun Mosque)
things.description: 1906 Ottoman-Mughal mosque built by the Sultan of Deli with Italian marble domes

things.name: Bukit Lawang Orangutan Rehabilitation Centre
things.description: Trek through Leuser rainforest for close encounters with wild Sumatran orangutans

things.name: Tjong A Fie Mansion
things.description: 1900 Chinese merchant mansion of the most powerful businessman in colonial Sumatra

things.name: Traditional Batak Village (Simanindo)
things.description: Batak king's palace, traditional stone tombs and Tor-Tor dance performances

things.name: Berastagi Fruit & Flower Market
things.description: Mountain market with passion fruit, markisa and flowers at the cool highland resort

things.name: Gunung Sinabung Volcano
things.description: Active stratovolcano above Berastagi with dramatic eruption clouds

things.name: Kabanjahe Market
things.description: Karo Batak highland market with jungle herbs, shallots and local produce

things.name: Bika Ambon (Medan Sponge Cake)
things.description: Medan's most famous export - honeycomb sponge cake from Jalan Mojopahit
